questions.prompt:
P, Q, and R are propositions. It is known that the truth value of proposition P is true, and
the values of both the propositions “(not P) or Q” and “(not Q) or R” are true. Which of the
following is a combination of the truth values of Q and R? Here, X or Y represents the
logical sum of X and Y, and not X represents the negation of X.
Q
R
choices: False False
False True
True False
True True

Q6. The function f (n) is recursively defined in terms of the natural number n as below. Which
of the following is the value of f (5)?
f (n): if n≦1 then return 1 else return n + f (n−1)
Which of the following is the appropriate description of the “selection sort” algorithm?
choices: An intermediate reference value is determined, and then the elements are divided into two groups of “larger” values and “smaller” values. This operation is recursively repeated.
Each set of elements extracted at regular intervals is sorted, and then the interval is further decreased. The operation is repeatedly performed until the interval becomes 1.

The element with the largest value is determined and swapped for the last element, and then the largest value of the unsorted elements is determined and swapped for the second-to-the-last element. This operation is repeated in the same way.
Two adjacent elements are repeatedly compared and swapped if the first element is larger than the second. This operation is repeated until all elements are arranged in an orderly fashion.

available in the cache memory, the CPU accesses the main memory. If the miss ratio is 0.2

approximate average memory access time in ns for the CPU? Here, there are only cache

cache management can be ignored.
Access destination
Access time (ns)
Cache Memory

Which of the following is the appropriate purpose of defragmentation of hard disks?
choices: To access disk files faster and more efficiently
To clean up temporary and junk files
To delete IBG (interblock gap) and increase capacity
To protect disk drives from physical failures

questions.prompt:
– 8 –
Q11.
Which of the following is a fail-safe concept for improving the security and reliability
of the information system?
choices: Even when the user performs an incorrect operation, a problem does not occur in the system.
Even when there is a partial system fault, the required functions of the overall system are maintained.
When a device configuring the system fails, damage can be minimized by enabling the system to stop safely.
When a system failure occurs, processing is continued by switching to a standby system.

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is the approximate availability of the system comprising five
devices, namely, A, B, C, D, and E as shown in the figure below? The numeric value in
parentheses represents the availability of each device. The system is operational if either
device connected in parallel is available.

There are minor and major page faults in an Operating System (OS). Which of the
following is an appropriate action of the OS when a major page fault occurs?
choices: Asking the user to input the instruction corresponding to the page
Looking for a page in CPU cache
Looking for a page in virtual memory on the hard disk
Looking for the missed block corresponding to the page on the physical memory

Q14.
A real-time OS that performs preemptive priority scheduling for tasks A and B with A
having a higher priority than B. Which of the following is the action that the OS takes?
choices: When A is launched during the execution of B, B is put into a ready state and A is executed.
When A is launched during the execution of B, B is put into a waiting state and A is executed.
When B is launched during the execution of A, A is put into a ready state and B is executed.
When B is launched during the execution of A, A is put into a waiting state and B is executed.

questions.prompt:
If a transaction processing program ends abnormally while updating the database, the
database is recovered by a rollback process. In these circumstances, which of the following
is the information that is used?
choices: Post-update information of log files
Pre-update information of log files
The latest backup file information
The latest snapshot information

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is a property on a database that guarantees a result where a
transaction either fully completes update processing or is revoked as if no processing took
place at all?
choices: Atomicity
Consistency
Durability
Isolation

questions.prompt: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a device that connects LANs?
choices: A bridge relays frames based on IP addresses.
A gateway converts the protocols of only the first through third levels in the OSI basic reference model.
A repeater extends the transmission distance by amplifying signals between segments of the same type.
A router relays frames based on MAC addresses.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is an example of a phishing email?
choices: An email containing pop-up ads for products unrelated to the email
An email intercepted, altered, and successfully sent
An email with a link that automatically installs an application collecting and sending data to the remote server
An email with a link that redirects to a fake banking site

between a plain text and a keystream to produce a cipher text, and between a ciphertext and
the keystream to recover the plaintext?
choices: AND
NAND
OR
XOR

questions.prompt:
Which of the following description is an appropriate use of asymmetric encryption to
ensure the confidentiality of a message that a sender is going to send to a receiver?
choices: The message is encrypted using a pre-shared secret key.
The message is encrypted using a private key of the sender.
The message is encrypted using a public key of the receiver.
The message is encrypted using a public key of the sender.

– 15 –
Q30.
Which type of attack involves intercepting communication between sender and
receiver?
choices: Brute Force Attack
Man-in-the-Middle Attack
Phishing Attack
Ransomware Attack

questions.prompt: Which of the following refers to a technique that is used in a credential stuffing attack?
choices: Focusing on the case where there are users that set a word from the dictionary as their password, selecting one (1) user ID as the target of the attack, and attempting to log in using words in the dictionary and their combinations as the password

Focusing on the case where there are users that use the same user ID and password on multiple websites, and attempting to log in using a list of user IDs and passwords fraudulently acquired from other websites
Selecting one (1) frequently used password, and attempting to log in by using user IDs of all possible combinations of characters

Selecting one (1) user ID as the target of the attack on a website that has a low maximum number of characters for passwords, and attempting to log in by using the user ID and passwords of all possible combinations of characters

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is the name of an attack where manipulation is made to display
a malicious website near the top of the results on a search website?
choices: Cross-site scripting
DNS cache poisoning
SEO poisoning
Social engineering

Q33. Which of the following is a function of security information and event management
(SIEM)?
choices: The centralized control of a range of communication devices in a network, and the changing of network configuration and security settings
The execution of a file in an isolated virtual environment, and the monitoring of communication to a C&C server and other behavior
The general analysis of logs that are collected from a range of devices, and the support of analysis and action by an administrator
The inspection of header information in packets, the identification of application programs that receive communication, and the control of communication

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is the UML behavioral diagram showing the behavior of a
single object in response to triggers?
choices: Activity diagram
Sequence diagram
State machine diagram
Use case diagram

questions.prompt: In object-oriented programming, which of the following is abstraction?
choices: Concealing implementation details and exposing only a simplified interface for interacting with objects
Creating a subclass instance inheriting attributes and behaviors from its superclass
Defining multiple methods with the same name but different parameters
Redefining in the child class a method that is already provided by the superclass with the same name and parameters but a different implementation

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is an appropriate description of “delegation” in object
orientation?
choices: A mechanism that creates one (1) new object using multiple objects as its parts
A mechanism where a lower-level class inherits the attribute or operation of a higher- level class
A mechanism where an application of an operation to a certain object automatically causes the application of that operation to related objects
A mechanism where an operation to a certain object is internally requested to be performed by another object

Condition testing

questions.prompt: Which of the following is the appropriate explanation of a stub or a driver used in a test?
choices: A driver is a module that is called from the module to be tested
A driver passes arguments and calls the module to be tested
A stub is a module used to call the module to be tested
A stub is used to display or print the values returned from the module to be tested

questions.prompt:
Scrum is an agile development method. In Scrum, which of the following is an event
where each member of the development team talks in turn about topics such as “things I did
yesterday,” “things I will do today,” and “obstacles,” and all members share the status of a
project?
choices: Daily Scrum
Retrospective
Sprint planning
Sprint review

improve program quality in program development through smooth communication between
programmers by exchanging their roles and reviewing each other’s work?

Pair programming
Planning game
Test-driven development

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is an appropriate purpose for using a Work Breakdown
Structure (WBS) in a software development project?
choices: To clarify the sequence relation of activities and understand the critical path that should be intensively managed
To hierarchically detail activities and segment them into a manageable scale
To optimize the total cost when there is a trade-off between the duration and the cost of development
To represent the schedule of an activity with a horizontal bar, and clarify the start time and end time of the activity as well as the progress at the present point in time

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is an appropriate explanation concerning the scope creep in
project scope management?
choices: A hierarchical decomposition of the total scope of work to be carried out by the project team to accomplish the project objectives and create the required deliverables
Any change to the project scope, which almost consistently requires an adjustment to the project cost or schedule
The sum of the products, services, and results to be provided as a project
The uncontrolled expansion of product or project scope without adjustments to time, cost, and resources

questions.prompt:
– 19 –
Q43.
Which of the following is a requirement for service level management?
choices: A capacity plan is created, implemented, and maintained while human, technical, informational, and financial resources are considered.
A service catalog and SLA are created for the service to be provided, and they are agreed upon with the customer.
Costs are monitored and reported against the budget; the financial forecasts are reviewed, and costs are managed.
Risks to service continuity and availability of services are assessed and documented.

questions.prompt:
A device that operates 24 hours a day, 360 days a year has an MTBF value of 1,440
hours. Which of the following is the average number of failures for this device for 360 days?
Here, the result is rounded to the closest whole number, and the MTTR of the device is
ignored.
Which of the following is the most appropriate description of a system auditor?
choices: The entire audit interview must be conducted by one (1) system auditor, because discrepancies may occur in the record if multiple auditors are involved.
The system auditor must instruct the department being audited to implement improvement measures for deficiencies identified during the audit interview.
The system auditor must make an effort to obtain documents and records that support the information obtained from the department being audited during the audit interview.
The system auditor must select audit interviewees from administrators who have been an auditor within the department being audited.

questions.prompt:
– 20 –
Q46.
Which of the following is an explanation of an application architecture that constitutes
enterprise architecture?
choices: It systematically describes the business processes or the information flows necessary for the business strategy.
It systematically describes the contents of the data necessary for business operations, the relations or structures between the data, etc.
It systematically describes the functions or system configurations that support business processes.
It systematically describes the technical components necessary for the developments and operations of the information systems.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a description of the SOA?
choices: A concept of constructing a system by considering the software functions as components called services and combining them
A concept of improving sales efficiency and quality by using IT for sales activities to increase sales and profits as well as to improve customer satisfaction
A concept of re-designing the business processes to innovatively improve the cost, quality, service, and speed
Outsourcing the in-house operations that are not part of the core businesses to concentrate the management resources on the core businesses

questions.prompt:
Which of the following is the work that is performed when non-functional requirements
are defined?
choices: Clarifying the flow of information (i.e., data) between the functions constituting business operations
Clarifying the interface for exchanging information with other systems
Creating the technical requirements for the development criteria and standards according to the programming language used in system development
Defining the scope to be implemented as system functions

questions.prompt:
– 21 –
Q49.
Which of the following is an explanation of diversity management?
choices: Both labor and management to reach an agreement on working conditions and work together with the aim of increasing profits
For employees to harmonize between work and private life, approach their work with a sense of purpose, and increase the vitality of the organization
For employees to take an autonomous approach to work with the aim of achieving the objectives that they set for themselves and be evaluated according to the degree of achievement
To increase the vitality of the organization by respecting the diversity among its employees in terms of aspects such as gender, age, and nationality

questions.prompt:
In innovation theory, consumers are classified into five (5) groups innovators, early
adopters, early majority, late majority, and laggards according to the timing of their
purchase of a new product. Which of the following is the appropriate explanation of the
early adopters?
choices: A group that accepts a new product, service, or other such offering at an early phase, has a large impact on consumers, is sensitive to trends, and makes decisions after collecting information themselves
A group that accepts a new product, service, or other such offering at the soonest phase without worrying about risks
A group that is skeptical about the adoption of a new product or new technology and only adopts it after seeing it being adopted by most people around them

A group that is the most conservative, has limited interest in movements in society and tends to adopt new trends only after they become common or, in some cases, remains firm in refusing their adoption

questions.prompt:
– 22 –
Q51.
Which of the following is a definition of Customer Relationship Management (CRM)?
choices: A framework used to support and integrate processes, people, and information across an organization to provide a unified gateway for information and a knowledge base for employees, partners, and customers
A technology for managing all of a company’s relationships and interactions with customers and potential customers in order to improve business relationships
A type of software that organizations use to manage day-to-day business activities such as accounting, procurement, project management, risk management and compliance, and supply chain operations

The broad range of activities required to plan, control, and execute a product's flow, from acquiring raw materials and production through distribution to the final customer, in the most streamlined and cost-effective way possible

questions.prompt: Which of the following is an appropriate explanation of concurrent engineering?
choices: A product development technique that sequentially executes processes, such as design, manufacturing, and sales activities
A technique that analyzes a target system and clarifies its specifications
A technique that executes processes, such as design and production planning, in parallel with product development
A technique that grasps the optimal combination of functions and costs and improves value through systematic procedures

questions.prompt: Which of the following is one of the main characteristics of a blockchain?
choices: A centralized ledger on a server
A client-server network
A distributed ledger on a peer-to-peer network
A type of cryptocurrency
